energy_definitions.high: Ready to tackle hard problems, fast thinking, clear focus
energy_definitions.medium: Can handle routine tasks, meetings, light creative work
energy_definitions.low: Struggling to start, need reminders, best for reading/light tasks
energy_definitions.crashed: Barely functional, post-bowel fatigue, post-rugby recovery

example_feedback.mood_notes: Felt sharp after routine, email was easier than expected
